summary: Fans hail this as one of the era's best shows, though recording specifics remain unclear
review: The reviewer rates the concert a perfect five stars and describes it as one of the best shows of that period, filled with vivid memories from the Indiana two‑night run. No technical details about the audio source or clarity are provided, so the recording quality cannot be assessed from this comment.
